title: Plerandra emiliana
taxonomy: Plerandra emiliana is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to Papua New Guinea. The classification of Plerandra emiliana has been revised several times, and it was previously known as Polyscias emiliana. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and inflammatory conditions.
